summary: The implementation successfully replaces Google Gemini with OpenAI GPT-4 integration, updates word count targets to 4000-5000 words in both backend and frontend, and includes migration logic to remove deprecated Gemini fields. All four requirements (REQ-46, REQ-47, REQ-48, REQ-49) are addressed with evidence in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Added migration.mo module to handle data migration from old actor state (removing Gemini-specific fields like geminiApiEndpoint and googleApiKey) to new actor state
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify any migration or data transformation requirements. The constraints mention preserving architecture and functionality, but do not request migration logic for removing old API configuration fields.
